basic_details.job_title: PAU Agromet Observer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has published the Agromet Observer Notification 2026 on 30 June 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 01 Agromet Observer position. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 37 years and holding 10+2 with Science stream, basic knowledge of computer operation, and Punjabi up to Matric standard are eligible to apply at the official website (https://www.pau.edu). The application process will be active from 30 June 2026 to 15 July 2026 through offline mode (plain paper application), and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: | 10+2 with Science stream Basic knowledge of Computer operation Punjabi upto Matric Standard | Age Limit: Not less than 18 years and not more than 37 years.

how_to_apply: Desirous candidates should send their applications on plain paper complete in all respects along with attested copies of testimonials and a bank draft of Rs. 200/- (in favour of Comptroller, PAU, Ludhiana payable at Ludhiana) to the Head, Department of Climate Change & Agricultural Meteorology, Punjab Agricultural University, Ludhiana.
Candidates must mention their mobile number and email ID in the application.
Last Date: 15 July 2026 (Applications received after due date or without fee will not be considered)

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Agromet Observer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Agromet Observer Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: The Head, Department of Climate Change & Agricultural Meteorology, Punjab Agricultural University, Ludhiana has issued Memo No. AM/2026/440-510 dated 30.06.2026 for filling up one post of Agromet Observer on contractual basis under the scheme “Integrated agro advisory services at PAU Ludhiana (Gramin Krishi Mausam Sewa)”. Download PAU Agromet Observer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Agromet Observer Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for PAU Agromet Observer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: 10+2 with Science stream Basic knowledge of Computer operation Punjabi upto Matric Standard Age Limit: Not less than 18 years and not more than 37 years.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for PAU Agromet Observer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Desirous candidates should send their applications on plain paper complete in all respects along with attested copies of testimonials and a bank draft of Rs. 200/- (in favour of Comptroller, PAU, Ludhiana payable at Ludhiana) to the Head, Department of Climate Change & Agricultural Meteorology, Punjab Agricultural University, Ludhiana. Candidates must mention their mobile number and email ID in the application. Last Date: 15 July 2026 (Applications received after due date or without fee will not be considered)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for PAU Ludhiana Agromet Observer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of application is 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Agromet Observer post at PAU Ludhiana?
faq.answer: Fixed salary of Rs. 21,700/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there for PAU Agromet Observer Recruitment?
faq.answer: Only 01 (One) post of Agromet Observer is to be filled on contractual basis.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for PAU Agromet Observer?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 10+2 with Science stream along with basic knowledge of Computer operation and Punjabi upto Matric level.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for PAU Ludhiana Agromet Observer post?
faq.answer: Age should be between 18 to 37 years.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for PAU Agromet Observer 2026?
faq.answer: Send application on plain paper with attested documents and Rs. 200/- bank draft to the Head of the Department by 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for PAU Agromet Observer vacancy?
faq.answer: Yes, a bank draft of Rs. 200/- in favour of Comptroller, PAU, Ludhiana is required.

faq.question: Q8. Will there be an interview for PAU Agromet Observer selection?
faq.answer: Yes, screening of documents will be done and shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Original certificates must be brought at the time of interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job at Punjab Agricultural University?
faq.answer: No, the post is on purely contractual basis and services can be terminated at any time without notice.

faq.question: Q10. Will TA/DA be provided for attending the interview at PAU Ludhiana?
faq.answer: No, No TA/DA will be given for attending the interview.
